scripts.dev: bash scripts/ensure-cluster.sh && npm run first-time -- --deploy && concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.clean-dev: ps aux | grep -E 'vite|tsx|cdktf|concurrently' | grep "$(pwd)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | xargs -r kill -9
scripts.worker: docker build -t deployworker.sh -f Dockerfile.worker . && npm run first-time -- --deploy
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:sync
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:infra:integration && npm run test:unit:vpn
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:frontend && npm run test:unit:backend
scripts.test:e2e:sync: npm run test:unit && npm run test:test:e2e:setup && npx playwright test tests/e2e.spec.ts && npm run test:test:e2e:teardown
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:test:e2e:setup && npx playwright test e2e && npm run test:test:e2e:teardown
